titleStmt.title: SII 7.382: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 382. (A.R. No. 177 of 1901). ON A PILLAR SET UP IN THE OUTER ENCLOSURE OF THE PANCHALINGESVARA TEMPLE, AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē
(ṁ) namaḥ . nama(ḥ)stuṁga
śiraścuṁbicaṁdracāma
racāravē . trayilōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlasta
ṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
śrī . jayādbhudaya śaka
varuṣa 1356 neya va
¨rttamāna pramādisaṁvatsara
da cayitra śu 1 Ā lu
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalē
śvaraṁ Arirāyavibhā
ḍa bhāṣegetappuvarā
yaragaṁḍa pū¨rvva da
kṣiṇa paścima Uttara sa
mudrādhipati śrīvīra
pratāpa yiṁmaḍima
hādēvarāyavo
ḍayarū pirumāḷa
daṇāyakarū rājyābhyu
daya paripālaneya mā
ḍuvalli vijeyanāgari
yalū sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ sakaḷarājya
vanū pratipālisuva
lli Ā dēvarāyavo
ḍeyara nirūpadiṁ
śrīmanmahāpradhāna
caṁḍarasavoḍe
yarū bārakūra
rājyavanū pratipā
lisuvalli Ā bāra
kūra kōṭiyakēri
ya halara Ādhīnava
māḍi mā¨rkkaṁḍēśvaradē
varallihaṁbattara ba
ḷiya heggaḍitiya maga
mādaṁṇaseṭṭiyarū
māḍida chatrada maṭhada
dha¨rmmakke pratidina Uṁba
brāhmara ja 12 kaṁ ye
ḷaŪriṁdaṁ mūḍalu
baṭekuḍura bāḷa catu
ssīmeya vivara mū
ḍalu jaṁbuvakaṭṭi
na sāliṁdaṁ paḍu
valu teṁkalu harida
hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍa
galu paḍuvalu hū
liyamakkaḷa maneya
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍa
lu baḍagalu harida sā
liṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi
ṁttī catussīmeya vo
ḷaguḷḷa mekke bittuva bede

gaṇagilu hā
ne 40 lekada
lū mūḍe 12
Adakke naḍava gē
ṇiya Akki tō
ṭa saha mū
ḍe 26 Adikaṁ
kaṇagadeyeṁ
ba bayalu bi
ttuva bedegaṇa
gilu hane 60
yidake Akki
ya gēṇi mū
ḍe 6 hostāgi
māḍida kaṁ
baḷagade bittu
va bedegaṇagi
lu ha 40 lekada
lū mū 25
baḍavakaḷiya
lu ha 40 leka
dalū bittuva
mū 25 mane
ya bāgilaga
deya keḷaga
ṇa bayala ga
de bittuva mū
ḍe 20 ho
sagade bittu
vadu ha 40
lke mū 6 kaṁ
baḷiyagade
bittuvadu
ha 40 lkeda
lū mū 4
mattaṁ kaṭṭi
ṁda voḷage
bittuva gade
mūḍe 8 A
(ṁ)ntūyeṁ
bhattayeṁ
ṭu mūḍe bi
ttuva baya
la mēle ma
ṭhada dhaṁ¨rma
kke naḍaUdu
hā 40 lkeda
Akki mūḍe
88 Aṁtu
maṭhada dha¨r(ṁ)
make naḍaU
du Aki mū
ḍe 120 A
kṣāradalu
nūṟaI
ppattuAkki
mūḍeyo
ḷage(paṁcali)

śrīpaṁceliṁga
dēvarige śrīru
drābhiṣēkava mā
ḍuva haritagō
trada yajuḥśā
kheya māyaṁ
ṇupādhyara ma
ga dēvarasera ma
kkaḷu makkaḷa sisā
ṁtara pāraṁpa
reyāgi Akki
mūḍe 10 na
ḍadubahudu
yēkādaśiya
dina Uḷida Akki
yanū śanivā
rake haṁneraḍu
maṁdi brāhmari
ge yeṁṇeya
tappade koṭṭu
baharu yi śā
sanava baradāta
kallukuṭiga ka
ṁnapama maṁ
gaḷa mahāśrī
śrī śrī
mādaṁṇaseṭṭi
yara saṁtāna
da Aḷiyaṁdi
ru yi dha(ṁ)¨rma
da bāḷanū bi
tti Ācaṁdrā
¨rkkavāgi na
ḍasi baha
Akki
Digital edition of SII 7.382 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
